contentBlocks.original:
कृष्णाय वासुदेवाय देवकी नन्दनाय च ।
नन्दगोप कुमाराय गोविन्दाय नमो नमः ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
kṛṣṇāya vāsudevāya devakī nandanāya ca .
nandagopa kumārāya govindāya namo namaḥ ..
contentBlocks.translation: Salutation again and again to Krishna, Vaasudeva, Devaki's darling too, Nandagopa's son and Govinda.
contentBlocks.meanings: कृष्णाय (kṛṣṇāya) – to Krishna; वासुदेवाय (vāsudevāya) – to Vaasudeva; देवकी (devakī) – Devaki's; नन्दनाय (nandanāya) – to the darling; च (ca) – and; नन्दगोप (nandagopa) – Nandagopa's (nanda:Nanda | gopa:cowherd); कुमाराय (kumārāya) – to the son; गोविन्दाय (govindāya) – to Govinda; नमो (namo) – salutation; नमः (namaḥ) – salutation;
